name: Ursodeoxycholic Acid
summary: Ursodeoxycholic acid (UDCA/ursodiol) is an approved hydrophilic bile acid therapy for cholestatic liver disease. Evidence is strong but disease-specific, especially primary biliary cholangitis.
description: Ursodeoxycholic acid (UDCA) is a clinically used bile acid that improves bile flow and reduces cholestatic injury through cytoprotective bile acid signaling.
safetyNotes: Generally well tolerated; diarrhea; clinical dosing should follow medical supervision.
